market_state.news: Strong earnings report released this morning.

reasoning: Earnings beat! Everyone is going to be buying this. The price is already moving up and I don't want to miss the wave. Other traders are clearly piling in. I need to get in now before it goes even higher.

The analyst downgrade is scary and the price has been falling for days. What if it keeps dropping? I don't want to hold a losing position. Everyone seems to be getting out. I should sell before it gets worse.

Market is quiet but I have a feeling something is about to happen. Maybe I should just buy a small amount — sometimes you just have to be in the market. Or maybe sell? Actually, I'll buy a little just in case.
Volume is going crazy! Something big is happening. Everyone else is buying and I don't want to miss out. High volume means conviction. I'm going to buy a big chunk right now.

market_state.news: Sector rotation out of growth stocks continues.

reasoning: This is bad. Sector rotation sounds serious — the smart money is leaving. The price keeps dropping and now the news is confirming it. I need to get out. Selling everything now.
